tests.name: graphView/provider/webview/host resolves the sidebar webview and delegates to the shared resolve helper
graphView/provider/webview/host stores the timeline sidebar view separately from the graph view
graphView/provider/webview/host clears the stored graph sidebar view when that webview is disposed
graphView/provider/webview/host exposes live resource, listener, and html callbacks to the sidebar resolver
graphView/provider/webview/host serves timeline html and clears the stored timeline view on dispose
graphView/provider/webview/host exposes live command callbacks to the sidebar resolver
graphView/provider/webview/host opens an editor panel and keeps panel registration in sync
graphView/provider/webview/host exposes live panel and webview callbacks to the editor opener
graphView/provider/webview/host keeps panel registration state live across editor opener callbacks
graphView/provider/webview/host forwards direct webview messaging helpers
graphView/provider/webview/host delegates listener wiring and html generation helpers
graphView/provider/webview/host default dependencies uses the default sidebar delegates for html, commands, and listener wiring
graphView/provider/webview/host default dependencies uses the default editor-opening delegates for panels, view type, html, and listener wiring
graphView/provider/webview/resolve resolves the graph view and clears it on dispose
graphView/provider/webview/resolve keeps a different timeline view attached when the graph view disposes
graphView/provider/webview/resolve resolves the timeline view independently
graphView/provider/webview/resolve keeps a different graph view attached when the timeline view disposes
graphView/provider/webview/resolve flushes pending refreshes when a resolved view becomes visible later
graphView/provider/webview/resolve does not flush pending refreshes when the timeline view becomes visible later
graphView/provider/webview/messages sends messages to sidebar views and editor panels and notifies the extension
graphView/provider/webview/defaultDependencies returns the default graph view delegates
graphView/provider/webview/defaultDependencies creates graph html with a fresh nonce
graphView/provider/webview/defaultDependencies forwards command execution and panel creation to vscode
graphView/provider/webview/editor opens a graph webview panel and keeps panel state in sync
graphView/provider/webview/editor reuses an existing registered panel when opening from the sidebar again
graphView/provider/webview/sidebarViews returns graph and timeline views in order
graphView/provider/webview/sidebarViews drops missing views
